levels.name: Feral Whispers
levels.description: The vampire can communicate with and command animals.
levels.effects: Speak with animals. Roll Charisma + Animal Ken (difficulty 6).
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 134

levels.name: The Beckoning
levels.description: Summon animals of a particular species to your location.
levels.effects: Roll Wits + Survival (difficulty 6) to summon animals.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 135

levels.name: Quell the Beast
levels.description: Suppress the Beast in yourself or others, preventing frenzy.
levels.effects: Roll Manipulation + Intimidation vs. target's Willpower to suppress frenzy.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 135

levels.name: Subsume the Spirit
levels.description: Temporarily possess an animal's body.
levels.effects: Roll Stamina + Animal Ken to possess an animal for one hour.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 136

levels.name: Draw Out the Beast
levels.description: Project the Beast outward as a separate entity to attack.
levels.effects: Summon an Aspect of the Beast that attacks independently.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 136

levels.name: Heightened Senses
levels.description: Supernaturally enhance one sense to perceive beyond human limits.
levels.effects: Gain enhanced sight, hearing, smell, taste, or touch. Perception + Awareness for rolls.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 134

levels.name: Aura Perception
levels.description: Read the auras of individuals to determine their emotional state and health.
levels.effects: Roll Perception + Empathy. Can detect lies, health issues, and emotional turmoil.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 134

levels.name: Spirit Touch
levels.description: Perceive the psychic residue of emotions left on objects.
levels.effects: Touch an object to sense recent emotional events. Roll Perception + Awareness.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 135

levels.name: Psychic Projection
levels.description: Project your consciousness from your body in spectral form.
levels.effects: Spirit form can travel and perceive. Roll Stamina to return or resist attack.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 135

levels.name: True Mind
levels.description: Mentally link with another vampire's mind.
levels.effects: Establish telepathic link. Roll Perception + Empathy vs. target's Willpower.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 135

levels.name: Cat's Grace
levels.description: Move with supernatural speed and agility.
levels.effects: Add 1 to Dexterity for movement and defense.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 137

levels.name: Pursuer
levels.description: Move with supernatural quickness to close distance.
levels.effects: Additional movement actions per turn.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 137

levels.name: Fleetness
levels.description: Move faster than the eye can track.
levels.effects: Add 2 to Dexterity for movement. Move through combat without penalty.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 137

levels.name: Lightning Strike
levels.description: Attack with impossible speed, striking multiple times.
levels.effects: Make multiple attacks in a single round.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 137

levels.name: Blur
levels.description: Move so fast you appear as a blur, essentially invulnerable.
levels.effects: Cannot be hit except by supernatural means or automatic weapons.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 137

levels.name: Command
levels.description: Give a simple one-word order that a target must obey.
levels.effects: Target must obey a one-word command. Roll Manipulation + Intimidation vs. Willpower.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 157

levels.name: Daze
levels.description: Confuse and disorient a target with a look.
levels.effects: Target is disoriented for one turn. Roll Charisma + Subterfuge vs. Willpower.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 157

levels.name: The Sleeping Mind
levels.description: Protects the vampire's mind from mental intrusion.
levels.effects: Add 3 dice to resist Auspex or Presence effects.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 158

levels.name: Possession
levels.description: Take complete control of a target's body.
levels.effects: Roll Manipulation + Dominate vs. Willpower. Possess body for up to one hour.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 158

levels.name: Terminate
levels.description: Issue a command so powerful the target cannot refuse, even at death.
levels.effects: Command forces specific action even if lethal.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 158

levels.name: Resilience
levels.description: Ignore the first level of damage each turn.
levels.effects: Automatically ignore one level of bashing or lethal damage per turn.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 143

levels.name: Toughness
levels.description: Supernaturally harden your body against damage.
levels.effects: Add 2 to Stamina for determining wound penalties.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 143

levels.name: Unswayable Mind
levels.description: Your mind cannot be influenced by external forces.
levels.effects: Gain 3 dice to resist social effects. Ignore Presence for one turn.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 143

levels.name: Flesh of Marble
levels.description: Your flesh becomes as hard as stone.
levels.effects: Reduce all incoming damage by 3 for one scene.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 144

levels.name: Fortify the Inner Light
levels.description: Your blood becomes poisonous to those who drink from you.
levels.effects: Anyone who bites you takes lethal damage. Must make VR check.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 144

levels.name: Cloak of Shadows
levels.description: Render yourself invisible to mortal sight.
levels.effects: Invisible to mortals and those without supernatural perception.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 195

levels.name: Mask of a Thousand Faces
levels.description: Alter your appearance to look like anyone.
levels.effects: Change appearance. Roll Charisma + Subterfuge to fool observers.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 195

levels.name: Chaining
levels.description: Create a shroud of silence around an area.
levels.effects: Area becomes soundproof. Noise draws attention to source.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 195

levels.name: Ghost in the Machine
levels.description: Render electronic equipment inoperative in your presence.
levels.effects: Electronics within 20 feet malfunction. Cameras see static.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 196

levels.name: Vanish from Mind's Eye
levels.description: Become completely unnoticeable even to those looking for you.
levels.effects: Cannot be perceived even by supernatural means.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 196

levels.name: Eyes of the Night
levels.description: See perfectly in any darkness.
levels.effects: Can see in complete darkness as if it were daylight.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 171

levels.name: Shadow Body
levels.description: Become a living shadow, immune to most physical harm.
levels.effects: Become shadow form. Immune to bashing/lethal. Vulnerable to light.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 171

levels.name: Arms of the Abyss
levels.description: Summon tentacles of darkness to attack.
levels.effects: Roll Manipulation + Occult. Tendrils can grapple or strike.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 171

levels.name: Shadow Cloak
levels.description: Wrap yourself in living darkness for protection.
levels.effects: Gain 4 armor against bashing/lethal. Attacks in darkness enhanced.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 172

levels.name: Night's Eternal Moonless Void
levels.description: Create a zone of absolute darkness that consumes all within.
levels.effects: Roll Manipulation + Occult. All within take lethal damage each turn.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 172

levels.name: Lethal Body
levels.description: Your blows carry supernatural force.
levels.effects: Add 1 to Strength for purposes of damage.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 198

levels.name: Earthshock
levels.description: Strike the ground with force that knocks down others.
levels.effects: Roll Strength + Brawl. Successes cause knockback to all nearby.

levels.name: Prowess
levels.description: Enhance your physical might beyond mortal limits.
levels.effects: Add 2 to Strength for damage and lifting.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 198

levels.name: Fist of the Destroyer
levels.description: Deliver a devastating blow that few can survive.
levels.effects: Roll Strength + Brawl. Double damage if target is grappled.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 198

levels.name: Wind Storm
levels.description: Channel your power into a tornado of force.
levels.effects: Roll Strength + Athletics. Everyone takes damage; objects destroyed.

levels.name: Awe

levels.effects: Roll Charisma + Performance. Those who see you become fascinated.

levels.name: Dread Gaze
levels.description: Project an aura of terror that horrifies all who see you.

levels.name: Entrancement
levels.description: Charm and beguile a target, making them devoted to you.
levels.effects: Roll Charisma + Subterfuge vs. Willpower. Target becomes enamored.

levels.name: Summon
levels.description: Call a person to you from any distance.
levels.effects: Roll Charisma + Presence vs. Willpower. Target must come to you.

levels.name: Majesty
levels.description: The ultimate expression of vampire presence.
levels.effects: All who perceive you must bow in homage. Cannot be resisted without supernatural aid.

levels.name: Eyes of the Beast
levels.description: Your eyes become glowing red, granting enhanced night vision.
levels.effects: See in darkness. Eyes glow red.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 199

levels.name: Malleable Visage
levels.description: Alter your facial features at will.
levels.effects: Change appearance. Roll Manipulation + Performance to fool observers.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 199

levels.name: Earth Meld
levels.description: Sink into the earth as if it were water.
levels.effects: Can sink into any earth or stone. Cannot move while melded.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 199

levels.name: Feral Claws
levels.description: Grow deadly claws from your fingers.
levels.effects: Gain claws that do lethal damage. Add 1 to Strength for damage.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 200

levels.name: Shape of the Beast
levels.description: Transform completely into a specific animal.
levels.effects: Transform into an animal. Retain mental faculties.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 200

levels.description: Alter your facial and bodily features at will.
levels.effects: Change appearance. Roll Manipulation + Medicine to create convincing forms.

levels.name: Body of Faith
levels.description: Harden your flesh to be resistant to damage.
levels.effects: Gain 2 armor. Appearance becomes unsettling.

levels.name: Flesh of Marble
levels.description: Transform your flesh into an organic material.
levels.effects: Become immune to bashing and lethal damage for one scene.

levels.description: Remove your own heart and manipulate your body at will.

levels.effects: Add 3 dice to Stealth rolls. Weapons become silent.

levels.effects: Roll Dexterity. Defense. Kills mortal targets instantly.

levels.name: Poison Blood
levels.description: Your blood becomes deadly poison to those who drink.
levels.effects: Anyone who drinks your blood takes lethal damage per turn.

levels.description: Create a zone of deathly silence and cold.
levels.effects: Area becomes deadly cold. Living creatures take bashing damage per turn.

levels.description: A deadly aura that withers all who attack you.
levels.effects: Attacker takes lethal damage each time they successfully hit you.

levels.description: Your eyes become serpentine, granting a hypnotic gaze.
levels.effects: Add 2 dice to social rolls. Targets cannot look away from your eyes.

levels.description: Your tongue becomes forked and can inject venom.
levels.effects: Bite injects venom causing lethal damage.

levels.description: Hypnotically compel victims to approach you.
levels.effects: Roll Charisma + Subterfuge vs. Willpower. Target must approach.

levels.name: Heart of the Dark
levels.description: Remove your heart and become immune to certain attacks.
levels.effects: Remove heart to become immune to staking. Vulnerable to fire.

levels.description: Transform into a massive serpent-like form.
levels.effects: Become huge serpent. Add 3 to Strength and Stamina.

levels.description: Basic thaumaturgic workings involving blood.
levels.effects: Roll Intelligence + Occult. Various minor blood effects.

levels.description: Create a blood pool with supernatural properties.

levels.name: Flowing Form

levels.name: Form of Stone
levels.description: Transform into a being of living stone.
levels.effects: Become stone golem. Immense strength and durability.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 290

levels.name: Temporal Manipulation
levels.description: Slightly alter the flow of time around you.
levels.effects: Gain extra action per turn or slow opponents.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 181

levels.name: Shrink Time
levels.description: Accelerate time for yourself.
levels.effects: Complete tasks in compressed time. Age slightly.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 181

levels.name: Moment's Right
levels.description: Make time flow perfectly for a moment.
levels.effects: Perfect shot or strike. Cannot miss.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 182

levels.name: Temporal Cascade
levels.description: Create a localized time storm.
levels.effects: Roll Wits + Occult. Affects time in area.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 182

levels.name: Oldest Curse
levels.description: Reverse or accelerate aging dramatically.
levels.effects: Make yourself ancient or reset to youth.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 182

levels.name: Taste of Death
levels.description: Sense death and dying around you.
levels.effects: Roll Perception + Awareness. Detect death aura.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 155

levels.name: Cilice
levels.description: Cause pain through faith and torment.
levels.effects: Roll Manipulation + Intimidation. Cause agony.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 155

levels.name: Bleakness
levels.description: Surround yourself with despair and cold.
levels.effects: Roll Charisma + Occult. Depression aura.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 155

levels.name: Heart of Dust
levels.description: Turn a heart to dust with a touch.
levels.effects: Roll Dexterity + Medicine vs. Stamina.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 156

levels.name: Covenant of Blood
levels.description: Make a blood pact with a demon.
levels.effects: Summon and bind a demon to serve you.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 156

levels.name: Aversion
levels.description: Create psychological aversion to an action.
levels.effects: Roll Manipulation + Subterfuge vs. Willpower.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 146

levels.name: Bleed
levels.description: Cause nosebleeds and psychic bleeding.
levels.effects: Roll Manipulation + Intimidation. Pain and disorientation.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 146

levels.name: Engulfing
levels.description: Cover target in invisible psychic membrane.
levels.effects: Roll Charisma + Subterfuge vs. target's Willpower.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 146

levels.name: Entrap
levels.description: Trap target in mental prison.
levels.effects: Roll Manipulation + Empathy vs. Willpower.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 147

levels.name: The Fate
levels.description: Rewrite target's psychic destiny.
levels.effects: Roll Manipulation + Occult vs. target's Willpower.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 147

levels.name: Skin of the Kindred
levels.description: Harden skin to resist damage.
levels.effects: Add 1 to Stamina for soaking.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 189

levels.name: Spines of the Dark
levels.description: Grow spines that inject blood toxins.
levels.effects: Attacks inject blood toxin. Lethal damage over time.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 189

levels.name: Tide of Crimson
levels.description: Control blood in bodies nearby.
levels.effects: Roll Manipulation + Medicine. Control blood in others.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 189

levels.name: Blood Armor
levels.description: Form armor from your blood.
levels.effects: Gain 4 armor. Blood loss each turn.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 190

levels.name: Transfusion
levels.description: Replace victim's blood with your own.
levels.effects: Roll Dexterity + Medicine. Transform target's blood.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 190

levels.name: Phobia
levels.description: Induce irrational fear in a target.
levels.effects: Roll Manipulation + Intimidation vs. Willpower.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 156

levels.name: Sleep of the Damned
levels.description: Cause target to fall into deep depression.
levels.effects: Roll Charisma + Subterfuge vs. Willpower.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 156

levels.name: Wither
levels.description: Cause body parts to wither from fear.
levels.effects: Roll Manipulation + Medicine.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 157

levels.name: Paranoia
levels.description: Make target suspicious of everyone.
levels.effects: Roll Manipulation + Subterfuge vs. Willpower.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 157

levels.name: Psychic Breakdown
levels.description: Break target's mind completely.
levels.effects: Roll Manipulation + Empathy vs. target's Willpower. Permanent insanity.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 157

combos.name: Scalpel Tongue
combos.description: Allows for a clever barbed quip that shames the target into silence.
combos.system: Roll Charisma + Subterfuge vs. target's Wits + Alertness

combos.name: Flesh of the Sun
combos.description: The vampire's body becomes resistant to sunlight and fire.
combos.system: Roll Stamina + Fortitude to resist fire and sunlight damage

combos.name: Unerring Pursuit
combos.description: Pursue targets at supernatural speed while remaining hidden.
combos.system: Roll Dexterity + Stealth to pursue without being seen

combos.name: Mind's Eye
combos.description: Read a target's mind while commanding them.
combos.system: Roll Perception + Empathy while using Dominate

combos.name: Iron Heart
combos.description: Become immune to social manipulation and intimidation.
combos.system: Roll Willpower to resist all social effects

combos.name: Shadow Step
combos.description: Move between shadows instantly.
combos.system: Roll Dexterity + Stealth to teleport between shadowed areas

combos.name: Breath of the Dragon
combos.description: Emit a terrifying roar that damages and panics nearby mortals.
combos.system: Roll Strength + Intimidation vs. target's Willpower

combos.name: Eyes of the Cat
combos.description: See perfectly in darkness and communicate with cats.
combos.system: Automatic - Perception equals that of a cat

combos.name: Whispered Resurrection
combos.description: Temporarily resurrect a recently dead corpse.
combos.system: Roll Intelligence + Occult vs. difficulty 8

combos.name: Vessel of Ruin
combos.description: Transform your body into a deadly weapon.
combos.system: Roll Strength + Brawl, add Potence dice to damage

combos.name: Blood of the Champion
combos.description: Inspire others to fight beyond their limits.
combos.system: Roll Charisma + Leadership

combos.name: Celerity of the Leopard
combos.description: Move with the speed of the fastest animals.
combos.system: Roll Dexterity + Athletics

combos.name: Eternal Guard
combos.description: Stand unmoving against any attack.
combos.system: Roll Willpower to resist all movement effects

combos.name: Mourning of the Psyche
combos.description: Drive target into permanent madness through grief.
combos.system: Roll Manipulation + Empathy vs. Willpower

combos.name: Night's Champion
combos.description: Become a champion of darkness itself.
combos.system: Roll Strength + Occult

combos.name: Scorpion's Touch
combos.description: Your touch injects deadly venom.
combos.system: Roll Dexterity + Medicine

combos.name: Terror of the Damned
combos.description: Summon the terror of death itself.
combos.system: Roll Charisma + Intimidation + Occult

combos.name: Warding Circle
combos.description: Create an impenetrable circle of protection.
combos.system: Roll Intelligence + Rituals

combos.name: Dragon's Breath
combos.description: Breathe magical fire.
combos.system: Roll Dexterity + Athletics + Thaumaturgy

combos.name: Thaumaturge's Transfusion
combos.description: Exchange blood with any creature magically.
combos.system: Roll Intelligence + Medicine + Occult
